responsibilities: Design and implement digital logic in VHDL/Verilog for FPGA-based systems across telecom, defense, or industrial applications.
Synthesize, place, and route FPGA designs using Xilinx Vivado or Intel Quartus to achieve timing closure at target clock frequencies.
Develop state machines, datapath logic, and control logic for real-time signal processing and high-speed data interfaces.
Debug FPGA designs in hardware using ChipScope or SignalTap, analyzing internal signals during live operation.
Integrate high-speed interfaces such as PCIe, Ethernet, and SerDes into FPGA designs for data acquisition systems.
Optimize FPGA resource utilization, power consumption, and timing margins through pipelining and logic restructuring techniques.
Collaborate with hardware and software teams to define FPGA-to-firmware interfaces and register map specifications.
Perform simulation and verification of FPGA designs using ModelSim or Questa to validate functional correctness pre-synthesis.
Implement DSP algorithms such as FFT, filtering, and modulation directly in FPGA fabric for real-time processing.
Document FPGA architecture, timing constraints, and pin assignments to support board bring-up and production releases.
